message:
feat(render-canvas,render-term): sequence notes + fragment rendering

Add visual rendering for sequence diagram notes and interaction
fragments in both Canvas2D and terminal renderers:

Canvas2D:
- Notes: yellow background rectangles with centered text
- Fragments: dashed-border boxes with kind label (loop/alt/par/etc.)
  in top-left corner, semi-transparent background

Terminal (sub-cell canvas):
- Notes: rectangles drawn at note bounds
- Fragments: rectangles drawn at fragment bounds

Both renderers use the LayoutSequenceNote and LayoutSequenceFragment
geometry computed by the layout engine. SVG rendering for notes and
fragments is pending (file reserved by another agent).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
